sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this beat-em-up title

special_mechanics.name: Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: Wrestlers have stamina bars displayed along the ring apron. An empty bar renders the player vulnerable to pinfalls, adding strategic depth to match management.

special_mechanics.name: Ring-Based Combat
special_mechanics.description: Isometric high-angle view presentation. In tag team matches, player can command NPC partner to attack opponents inside or outside the ring.

special_mechanics.name: Pinfall Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: When stamina is depleted, opponent becomes vulnerable to pinfall damage.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No detailed physics documentation available. Sources mention 'fluid gameplay' and 'unique movesets' for each wrestler but provide no quantitative movement, gravity, or jump parameters. Game is a professional wrestling beat-em-up with emphasis on stamina management and ring positioning rather than platforming physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - WWF WrestleMania Challenge
